prompt: I need to add a new DS for a 'Machine Learning Model Serving Platform' using Kubeflow. Set this to high priority. Also, modify URS-025, 'Search Functionality', to incorporate fuzzy matching and natural language processing for queries.

expected.addRequirement: add a new DS for a 'Machine Learning Model Serving Platform' using Kubeflow.
expected.prioritizeRequirement: set priority to high for the new DS.
expected.modifyRequirement: modify URS-025, 'Search Functionality', to incorporate fuzzy matching and natural language processing for queries.
